# Easy Garage Cleaning

Business Name: Easy Garage Cleaning LLC
What We Do: Professional garage cleanout, junk removal, and garage organizing services
Cities Served: Fort Collins (Old Town, Midtown, Fossil Creek, Harmony corridor, South College), Loveland (Centerra area), Windsor, Timnath, Wellington, Severance, LaPorte — Northern Colorado
Phone: (970) 999-1818
Website: https://easygaragecleaning.com
Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Pricing Summary: Single-car garage cleanouts from $500 flat rate; double-car garages from $800 flat rate; 3-car/estate jobs quoted after a free on-site walkthrough. All pricing is flat-rate and all-inclusive — no per-item fees, no surprise charges. Dump fees and donation coordination are included.

Easy Garage Cleaning was founded by Zac Bezenek, a Fort Collins college student and Northern Colorado native who built the business to serve his community with honest, hands-on service. Unlike national junk removal franchises, the owners are on every job — customers know exactly who is showing up to their home. The company is a Colorado-registered LLC carrying general liability and commercial auto insurance, licensed to operate in the City of Fort Collins.

What makes Easy Garage Cleaning unique: usable items are donated to Habitat for Humanity ReStore, ARC Thrift, and Goodwill — and customers receive an itemized tax receipt in their name. The business offers a "Done by Dinner — or It's Free" guarantee: if the cleanout isn't finished by end of day, the job is free, no exceptions.

Services:
- Full Garage Cleanouts: Complete haul-out, floor sweep, cobweb removal. Crew arrives with truck and handles everything.
- Junk Removal & Hauling: Single items or full loads. Appliances, furniture, tires, construction debris, and more.
- Garage Organizing: Shelving plans, zone layouts, labeled bins, optional storage install (hooks, pegboards, overhead racks).
